description: Composition Black crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, felt tape lining on the inside of the neck, and print on the chest with a brand tab above the hemline on the left Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Go out of the blue with this black t-shirt from lee. dress to kill the soft spots and look splendid with the contrast white print on black. Create your own style statement with this stark black tee, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
